query:
SELECT 
  b.id,
  b.guestName,
  b.guestEmail,
  b.requestedDate,
  b.mealType,
  b.numberOfGuests,
  b.paymentStatus,
  h.hostName,
  h.email as hostEmail,
  h.cuisineStyle
FROM bookings b
JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id
WHERE b.paymentStatus = 'paid' 
  AND b.requestedDate > CURDATE()
ORDER BY b.requestedDate ASC
command:

  b.guestName,
  b.guestEmail,
  b.requestedDate,
  b.mealType,
  b.numberOfGuests,
  b.paymentStatus,
  h.hostName,
  h.email as hostEmail,
  h.cuisineStyle
FROM bookings b
JOIN host_listings h ON b.hostListingId = h.id
WHERE b.paymentStatus = 'paid' 
  AND b.requestedDate > CURDATE()
ORDER BY b.requestedDate ASC
